completed_tasks.name: Gap fixes from session
completed_tasks.notes: 5 gap-closure commits: footer drag affordance, logo images, column layout/typography, right-align columns, social-link Lucide icons + yellow color

remaining_tasks.name: Human verify — Site Chrome in live customizer
remaining_tasks.notes: Blocking checkpoint. Dev must load fixocargo bundle in project-theta-fe, verify all 3 chrome sections across mobile/desktop, confirm block add/remove/reorder works, then type 'approved'.

human_actions_pending.action: Verify all 3 Site Chrome sections in live Theta customizer (project-theta-fe)
human_actions_pending.context: Plan 02-04 is a blocking human-verify checkpoint. Run yarn build, load fixocargo bundle, check AnnouncementBar / SiteHeader / Footer across mobile+desktop. Confirm block editing works. Type 'approved' to close Phase 02.

decisions.rationale: AspectRatio collapses to 0x0 in flex row without explicit width — logo invisible. Plain img with h-[54px] w-auto matches design and always renders.
Chrome section — no drag affordance overlay. Same as AnnouncementBar and SiteHeader.

decisions.decision: Social icons: Lucide for FB/IG/LI/Twitter/YT, custom SVG for WhatsApp/TikTok
decisions.rationale: Lucide 0.553 has no TikTok or WhatsApp icons.

next_action: Open project-theta-fe customizer, build fixocargo bundle (yarn build), load it, verify all 3 chrome sections, type 'approved' to close Phase 02 and proceed to Phase 03.
context_notes: Phase 02 execution (Plans 02-01 through 02-03) was done in prior sessions. This session was all gap-closure on the chrome sections based on visual review. Plan 02-04 is the final blocking human-verify step. No code changes needed — just need the developer to sign off in the live customizer.
